@seed_user username=alice password=Alice1! first_name=Alice last_name=Smith university=USF major=CS grad_year=2027
@seed_user username=bob password=Bob123! first_name=Bob last_name=Jones university=UCF major=Math grad_year=2026

# Bob sends request to Alice
1       # Login
bob
Bob123!
4       # Find someone you know
Alice Smith
1       # Send connection request
9       # Logout

# Alice accepts Bob's request
1       # Login
alice
Alice1!
5       # View pending requests
1       # Accept
9       # Logout
3       # Exit
